name: Job Scraper - Visa Sponsored UK Jobs

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ external_id: $json.external_id, title: $json.title, company: $json.company, location: $json.location, description: $json.description, url: $json.url, salary_min: $json.salary_min, salary_max: $json.salary_max, source: $json.source, visa_sponsored: $json.visa_sponsored, match_score: $json.match_score, status: $json.status }) }}
